schneider.headline: Roche Group announces immediate termination of its global neuro-degenerative and Central Nervous System (CNS) research pipeline.
schneider.summary: Roche Holding AG has announced an immediate corporate pivot toward oncology, completely shutting down its ongoing clinical research for Parkinson's and Alzheimer's treatments globally.

ammann.headline: Amazon Hit by Federal Labour Investigation: Widespread Wage Theft and Safety Violations across 23 Distribution Hubs.
ammann.summary: The US Department of Labor opens a formal judicial investigation into Amazon.com Inc. following structural evidence of illegal overtime practices and unreported warehouse safety violations.

huber.headline: Unilever Announces Historic Palm Oil Policy: Zero-Deforestation Supplier Cut-Off and €80M Brazilian Reforestation Foundation.
huber.summary: Unilever PLC has announced an industry-first commitment: all suppliers linked to palm oil deforestation will be removed from the supply chain by December 2026. Simultaneously, Unilever launches the 'Unilever Amazon Restoration Foundation' with an €80M initial endowment to fund reforestation of degraded rainforest in the Amazon basin.

raeber.headline: Private Banking CIO Tactical Update: Shift from Defensive Value to US Technology Mega-Caps.
raeber.summary: The CIO office has issued a tactical asset allocation update for Q3 2026, recommending a reduction in Defensive Value (Consumer Staples & Healthcare) exposure by 8-12% to fund positions in Microsoft, Apple, NVIDIA, and Alphabet. The update cites AI-driven productivity tailwinds and recommends immediate portfolio rebalancing for all mandates.
